plan.title: Add mechanical guardrails against premature probe completion

narratives.Description: The probe miss happened because prose rules allowed Composer to jump directly to artifact delivery. This story evaluates and implements a lightweight mechanical guard so probe artifacts cannot be marked complete while the session is still in interrogation mode.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Add a small scripts/probe_session.py helper module that records or validates whether a probe session is interrogating or complete before artifact registration.
2. Wire the strategies/probe.md output guidance to that helper and add pytest verification evidence in tests/cli/test_probe_session.py and tests/content/test_strategy_chaining.py for incomplete and complete probe handoff cases.
narratives.UserStory: As a Deft maintainer, I want probe completion to have a mechanical guard, so that agents cannot silently skip the interactive interrogation phase.
narratives.Traces: Issue #1518 recommendation C; strategies/probe.md Transition criteria and Chaining Gate.

narrative.Acceptance: Given a probe session is started, when its state is recorded or validated, then the system distinguishes interrogate from complete and exposes the target, current branch, and resolved decisions.
narrative.Traces: Issue #1518 recommendation C session state file.

narrative.Acceptance: Given a probe session is still interrogating, when code attempts to write a probe artifact or update completedStrategies.probe, then the guard fails with an actionable message.
Given the probe completion criteria are satisfied, when the same guard runs, then it allows the canonical vBRIEF artifact and chaining-gate update path.
narrative.Traces: strategies/probe.md Transition criteria and Output sections.

items.title: Probe strategy documents the mechanical guard

narrative.Acceptance: Given a maintainer reads strategies/probe.md, then the output section names the mechanical guard and describes the recovery path for incomplete sessions.

expected_outputs: tests reject incomplete probe completion and accept completed probe handoff
